items.descriptionZh: 饭前、便后、回家后，用肥皂把小手洗干净。
items.descriptionEn: Before meals, after the bathroom, and after coming home, wash your hands with soap.

items.descriptionZh: 早晚刷牙，让牙齿干净又健康。
items.descriptionEn: Brush your teeth in the morning and at night to keep them clean and healthy.

items.descriptionZh: 口渴时喝白水，身体会更舒服。
items.descriptionEn: Drink water when you are thirsty to help your body feel good.

items.descriptionZh: 每天尝一尝不同颜色的蔬菜，身体长得棒。
items.descriptionEn: Try vegetables in different colors every day to help your body grow strong.

items.descriptionZh: 甜食可以偶尔吃一点，吃完记得漱口或刷牙。
items.descriptionEn: Sweet treats are for sometimes, and clean your mouth afterward.
items.example: 我吃完糖果后喝水漱口。

items.descriptionZh: 晚上按时睡觉，早上精神满满。
items.descriptionEn: Go to bed on time at night so you can wake up with energy.

items.descriptionZh: 跑一跑、跳一跳，身体会更有力量。
items.descriptionEn: Run, jump, and move to help your body get stronger.

items.descriptionZh: 流鼻涕时用纸巾擦干净，再把纸巾丢进垃圾桶。
items.descriptionEn: Use a tissue for a runny nose, then put it in the trash.

items.descriptionZh: 咳嗽或打喷嚏时，用手肘内侧轻轻挡住。
items.descriptionEn: Cover coughs and sneezes with the inside of your elbow.

items.descriptionZh: 看书和看屏幕要保持距离，用眼一会儿就看看远处。
items.descriptionEn: Keep a good distance from books and screens, then look far away to rest your eyes.
items.example: 我看一会儿书，再看看窗外。

items.descriptionZh: 如厕后冲水、洗手，把衣服整理好。
items.descriptionEn: After using the bathroom, flush, wash hands, and fix your clothes.

items.descriptionZh: 天气合适时到户外玩一玩，晒晒温暖的太阳。
items.descriptionEn: When the weather is nice, play outside and enjoy the warm sunshine.
